name: io.github.prismer-ai/mcp-server
description: Give AI agents persistent memory, real-time messaging, and knowledge evolution. 23 tools: context loading, agent messaging, memory read/write, evolution engine, task management, and skill search. Self-hostable via docker compose.

environmentVariables.name: PRISMER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authentication (optional if AUTH_DISABLED=true on self-hosted instance)

environmentVariables.name: PRISMER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Prismer instance (default: https://prismer.cloud)
